generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component integrated with Building Control Systems (BCS) for dynamic lighting control, enabling bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin via Eclipse Ditto middleware interfaces."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) component responsible for HVAC operations, modeled within the BIM environment to receive control signals from the Digital Twin for energy-efficient operation."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed in operational buildings to capture real-time occupancy data, integrated with BIM via metadata annotations and communicating with the Digital Twin through Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time environmental temperature data, annotated with middleware metadata (tenant IDs) and ingested via Eclipse Hono for Digital Twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring real-time humidity levels, integrated with BIM model through device configuration metadata and communicating with the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor monitoring ambient light levels, mapped to corresponding BIM elements and transmitting data to the Digital Twin through Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT device tracking real-time energy consumption metrics, configured within the BIM environment and synchronized with the Digital Twin via bidirectional Eclipse Ditto communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic representation of building geometry, spatial relationships, and component hierarchies using Industry Foundation Classes (IfcSchema) as the foundational BIM model for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extensions to BIM models containing device configurations (sensor/actuator endpoints) and middleware metadata (Eclipse Hono/Ditto tenant IDs) for runtime synchronization with physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Rule-based or AI-driven optimization policies (e.g., reinforcement learning models from BOREALIS project) embedded within the Digital Twin for dynamic building operations control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation framework implemented in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and control of building infrastructure within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns captured by IoT sensors and synchronized with the BIM model through middleware metadata annotations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time environmental data (temperature, humidity, light levels) ingested via Eclipse Hono and mapped to corresponding BIM elements for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics from IoT monitors, integrated with BIM through device configuration metadata and used for operational optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SustainabilityReportingService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform providing secure, scalable data ingestion from physical sensors to the Digital Twin with MQTT protocol support."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware framework enabling bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and physical systems for device management and control logic deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables BidirectionalControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization platform for immersive monitoring and interactive control of building infrastructure within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools automating transformations from BIM models to runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto device configurations, Unreal Engine plugins)."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industry-standard BIM authoring tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) used for initial building modeling and device configuration within the Digital Twin framework."
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AI framework implementing reinforcement learning policies (as demonstrated in BOREALIS project) for adaptive building operations optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization and analysis of operational data (occupancy, environmental conditions, energy consumption) through Unreal Engine 5 immersive interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service using reinforcement learning to adjust building operations (lighting, HVAC) for energy efficiency and occupant comfort based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyAction
]

instance BidirectionalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling seamless synchronization between virtual and physical systems for device configuration and control logic deployment via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D dashboard providing stakeholders with operational status updates, occupancy patterns, and energy consumption metrics through Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance MaintenanceAlertService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance service generating alerts based on sensor data anomalies (e.g., equipment degradation patterns) detected in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing energy consumption data to recommend adjustments for cost savings and sustainability compliance within the building infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:provides CostSavingsAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status updates of building systems (lighting, HVAC, occupancy) visualized through the Digital Twin interface."
]

instance OccupancyTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical and real-time occupancy patterns to inform space utilization and operational planning decisions."
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of building systems (lighting, HVAC) to optimize energy consumption based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control of environmental conditions (temperature, humidity) to enhance occupant comfort through reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of device configurations (sensor/actuator settings) from the Digital Twin to physical systems via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization of control logic between virtual and physical systems for seamless operational integration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations generated from sensor data anomalies detected in the Digital Twin system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CostSavingsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommended adjustments to building operations for cost reduction based on energy consumption analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SustainabilityReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Compliance reporting insights generated from energy consumption data for sustainability frameworks like LEED certification."
]

instance EquipmentHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of equipment health metrics derived from sensor data to predict maintenance needs and operational reliability."
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMCoreModel, RuntimeMetadataModel, ControlPolicyModel
]

instance OperationalBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, EnergyMonitor, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains VisualizationModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

// Added missing instances to resolve references
instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the deployment of runtime artifacts from BIM models to physical systems via standardized interfaces."
]

instance SustainabilityReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating sustainability reports and compliance documentation based on energy consumption and operational data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SustainabilityReportInsight
]

instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of occupancy patterns and trends for space utilization analysis."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **runtime control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted to physical actuators through middleware (Eclipse Ditto). The DT processes data (e.g., predictive analytics, optimization algorithms) and sends commands (e.g., adjust lighting, trigger HVAC adjustments) back to the physical system. This interaction is enabled by **standardized extension points** in the framework, allowing seamless integration of control logic derived from BIM models and runtime data."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** in this Digital Twin system is **real-time and continuous**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** to ensure low-latency interaction between the Physical Twin and Digital Twin. The framework supports **event-driven data processing** for immediate responses (e.g., sensor alerts, control adjustments) and **time-series data aggregation** for long-term analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends, occupancy patterns). The **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware** enables high-frequency data exchange, while the **Unreal Engine visualization** updates dynamically to reflect real-time changes in the physical infrastructure. This time scale is critical for **predictive maintenance**, **energy optimization**, and **occupant comfort adjustments** in operational buildings."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **Core DT Framework**: Central hub integrating BIM semantics, runtime data, and control logic.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for **real-time data exchange** and device management.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for **immersive 3D interaction** with the DT.
   - **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for integrating **custom services** (e.g., AI analytics, stakeholder dashboards) without disrupting core functionality.
   - **Runtime Configuration Manager**: Enables **dynamic adjustments** to the DT (e.g., updating control policies) without full redeployment. The constellation supports **scalability** from single-device DTs to entire building infrastructures via standardized BIM-based semantics."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During design, the BIM model serves as the foundational representation. During construction, the DT integrates **as-built data** (e.g., sensor placements, device configurations) to refine the virtual model. In operation, the DT continuously synchronizes with **real-time operational data** (e.g., occupancy, energy usage) to enable dynamic optimization and predictive maintenance. The framework also supports **post-occupancy adjustments** (e.g., reinforcement learning updates in BOREALIS) to adapt the DT to evolving operational needs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, validating synchronization accuracy.
   - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Automated checks for **semantic consistency** between BIM models and runtime artifacts (e.g., ensuring device configurations match physical deployments).
   - **Uncertainty Modeling**: Incorporation of **sensor noise, latency, and environmental variability** into DT simulations to assess robustness.
   - **Post-Occupancy Evaluation**: Continuous comparison of DT predictions (e.g., energy consumption forecasts) with actual operational data to refine models. The framework also addresses **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al.) by ensuring periodic synchronization between BIM and runtime data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT system employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for technical connectivity, facilitating **real-time data exchange** between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin. While specific protocols like **MQTT** are implied by the middleware’s design (e.g., Ditto’s support for MQTT-based communication), the documents do not explicitly mention MQTT. The connection architecture includes:
   - **Bidirectional communication channels**: Enabling sensor data ingestion and control signal transmission.
   - **Standardized interfaces**: For integrating with Building Control Systems (BCS) and other operational devices. The middleware abstracts lower-level protocols, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT system is deployed in a **scalable, cloud-based environment** to support large-scale infrastructure monitoring and optimization. The framework does not specify exact hosting technologies (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes), but emphasizes **scalable deployment** capabilities to accommodate growing data volumes and service integrations. The middleware (Hono/Ditto) is designed for **distributed deployment**, enabling horizontal scaling of DT components as needed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the foundational modeling paradigm. While the documents do not explicitly mention industry-specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)**, BIM is recognized as the standard solution for the construction sector. The middleware (Hono/Ditto) aligns with **open-source and standardized IoT protocols**, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, BACnet, KNX) are not detailed in the provided context."
]
